exceptions.description: The complete publisher-origin direct and transitive Linux x86_64 / CPython 3.13 wheelhouse is not held.
exceptions.release_requirement: Acquire and verify every required artifact, create a truthful uv.lock with uv 0.11.29, and pass uv sync --frozen --offline --no-python-downloads.

exceptions.description: The official cl100k_base.tiktoken asset is not held.
exceptions.release_requirement: Acquire the official asset, match SHA-256 223921b76ee99bde995b7ff738513eef100fb51d18c93597a113bcffe865b2a7, and prove network-disabled tokenization.

exceptions.description: The operator-workstation WSL2 host platform receipt has not been executed.
exceptions.release_requirement: Run the platform preflight in WSL2 and record kernel, architecture, Python 3.13.5, uv 0.11.29, and no-download controls.
